message:
🐛 Clear stale demo-token when backend comes online

When the backend was temporarily unavailable during login, the app
would set a demo-token. On subsequent page loads, refreshUser() would
see demo-token and immediately enter demo mode without re-checking
backend availability — leaving the user stuck with demo data even
after the backend recovered.

Now refreshUser() checks backend availability when it finds a
demo-token. If the backend is online, it clears the stale token so
the login screen appears and the user can authenticate with a real JWT.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
